title: Task 3: 扩展数据库 Schema (AC: 2, 3)
summary: Implementation correctly fulfills Task 3 requirements. Added auto_adjust_silent and silent_adjustment_paused_until fields to settings table with proper migrations, struct updates, and comprehensive test coverage (8 new tests). Fixed minor formatting issues during review.

issues.description: Test isolation with global DB_CONNECTION causes intermittent failures with parallel execution (--test-threads=1 required)
issues.recommendation: Pre-existing architectural issue, not introduced by this change. Tests pass with single-threaded execution.

issues.description: Formatting inconsistency in assert_eq! macros (fixed during review)

strengths: Correctly implemented all 5 required changes: ALTER TABLE migrations, Settings struct fields, SELECT query, UPDATE query, test helpers
Used idempotent migration pattern (let _ = conn.execute()) consistent with existing codebase
Default value of 1 (true) for auto_adjust_silent matches AC3 requirement for auto-adjust enabled by default
Proper type conversions for boolean fields (INTEGER 0/1 <-> Option<bool>)
8 comprehensive tests covering: default values, persistence (true/false), clearing values, RFC3339 format validation
Updated test helpers in all 3 modules (memory_storage, manual_entry, synthesis) to maintain consistency
